title: MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE ABUSE - 211info
text: NEW PRIORITIES FAMILY SERVICES BEND MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE ABUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual counseling, couples counseling, group counseling, alcohol and drug assessment, informational groups, recovery planning and relapse prevention, DUII information classes and diversion Treatment, smoking cessation, case management, and self-help support groups. Transportation can be arranged. Housing may be provided for program participants. 389 SW Scalehouse Court Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-noon Email (541) 306-4446 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 306-4446 Emily Shaw [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to schedule appointment FEES: Most insurance plans accepted; payment arrangements available DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Smoking/Vaping Cessation Support If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
